description: GROUP E: Sales Intelligence - Team Leaderboards, Territory Management, Multi-Tenant Hierarchy, Visitor Tracking
steps: Create app/tenant/leaderboards/page.tsx - Leaderboard UI with: time period selector (this week, this month, this quarter, custom), metrics tabs (deals won, revenue closed, activities completed, conversion rate), ranked user list with avatar/name/stats, bar chart visualization using recharts. Follow existing page patterns.

Create app/api/tenant/leaderboards/route.ts - GET leaderboard data. Query params: metric (deals_won, revenue, activities, conversion), period (week, month, quarter, custom with start/end). Aggregates from deals/activities tables. No module gate (part of core analytics).

Create lib/territories.ts - Territory engine: assignTerritory(userId, territoryId), getTerritoryForLocation(country, state, city), resolveOwner(contactLocation) returns userId of territory owner. Support hierarchical territories (region > country > state > city).

Create drizzle/schema/territories.ts - Tables: territories (id, tenantId, name, parentId self-ref, type ['region','country','state','city','custom'], geoConfig jsonb with country/state/city/postalCodes, assignedTo userId, lifecycle), territory_assignments (id, tenantId, territoryId, userId, role ['owner','member'], lifecycle). Export from index.ts.
Create app/api/tenant/territories/route.ts - CRUD for territories. GET tree structure, POST create, PUT update assignments, DELETE soft-delete. Module-gated to 'core-crm'.

Create drizzle/schema/hierarchy.ts - Tables: tenant_hierarchy (id, parentTenantId, childTenantId, relationship ['parent','division','franchise'], lifecycle), hierarchy_permissions (id, hierarchyId, permission ['view_data','manage_users','share_contacts','aggregate_reports'], lifecycle). Export from index.ts.
Create app/api/tenant/hierarchy/route.ts - GET hierarchy tree, POST add child org, PUT update relationship, DELETE remove. Requires admin. Module-gated to 'core-crm'.

Create lib/visitor-tracking.ts - Visitor identification: trackPageView(visitorId, url, tenantId), identifyVisitor(visitorId, email, tenantId) links to contact, getVisitorScore(visitorId) calculates engagement score based on pages viewed/time spent/frequency. Include scoring rules: homepage=1pt, pricing=5pts, demo=10pts, docs=3pts.

Create drizzle/schema/visitors.ts - Tables: visitors (id, tenantId, fingerprintId, identifiedContactId nullable, firstSeenAt, lastSeenAt, totalPageViews int, score int, lifecycle), page_views (id, tenantId, visitorId, url, title, referrer, duration int seconds, viewedAt). Export from index.ts.

Create app/api/tenant/visitors/route.ts - GET list visitors with scores (filter: identified/anonymous, score range), GET /api/tenant/visitors/[id] detail with page view timeline. Module-gated to 'ai-assistant'.
Create app/api/tenant/visitors/track/route.ts - POST public endpoint (no auth, uses API key in header) for tracking script to send page views. Lightweight, fast response.
Create tests/unit/territories.test.ts - Test territory assignment, location matching, hierarchical resolution. At least 5 test cases.
Create tests/unit/visitor-tracking.test.ts - Test page view scoring, visitor identification, score calculation. At least 5 test cases.
acceptance_criteria: npm test passes with all new territory and visitor tracking tests passing
Leaderboard page renders with time period selector and metric tabs
Territory engine resolves location to territory owner correctly
Visitor scoring assigns correct points based on page URL patterns
Hierarchy schema supports parent-child tenant relationships
All new schema tables exported from drizzle/schema/index.ts
